results.rendered_html: harītakī f. (rarely ˚ka, m. n.) the yellow Myrobalan tree, Terminalia Chebula (28 synonyms and seven varieties are enumerated; the fruit is used for dyeing yellow and as a laxative),  Suśr. ;  Hariv. ;  VarBṛS.
